title.purpose: Card headings, section titles, dialog headers.

body.purpose: Row labels, descriptions, form fields. Max 65ch on prose.

label.purpose: Status text within components, supporting descriptions, badge content.

micro.purpose: Badge text, nav item labels, smallest metadata. Tracking compensates for 11px optical crowding.

section-label.purpose: Icon-prefixed section headers. One per visual grouping.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Section and list entrance. Reduced-motion: animation none.

motion.name: stagger-offset
motion.purpose: List entrance stagger. Apply via animation-delay: var(--stagger, 0ms).

motion.name: transition-standard
motion.purpose: Default state change transitions: hover, focus, active. 200ms.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary confirmation actions: submit, accept, check in.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; background: #ffffff; color: #000000; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.8); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary confirmation. Pairs alongside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; background: transparent; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.8); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Icon buttons, cancel actions, inline text controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s, transform 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard single-line input. Used in forms, invite flows, settings.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 0 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius: 16px; font-size: 14px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.2s; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #ffffff; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Badge — Verified
components.description: Confirmed gym check-in. Solid emerald fill.
components.css: .ds-badge-verified { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; background: rgba(16,185,129,0.1); color: #34d399; border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.5); border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Badge — Missed
components.description: Missed check-in. Red tint — consequence is owed.
components.css: .ds-badge-missed { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); color: #f87171; border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.5); border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Primary content container. Floats on the void with glass depth.
components.html:
Challenge vs Jamie

3 of 4 days this week
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 2rem; padding: 20px; backdrop-filter: blur(24px); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; margin: 0 0 4px; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); margin: 0; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: VS Challenge Card
components.description: Head-to-head challenge card. Signature component — two avatars, status labels, stake pill.
components.html:
YO

You

✓ checked in

VS
JD

Jamie

✗ missed

$20 stakeOpen ›
components.css: .ds-vs-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 2rem; padding: 20px; backdrop-filter: blur(24px); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-vs-card:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-vs-body { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: stretch; gap: 8px; } .ds-vs-side { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex: 1; text-align: center; } .ds-vs-avatar { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: #ffffff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-vs-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; margin: 0; } .ds-vs-status { font-size: 12px; margin: 0; } .ds-vs-verified { color: #34d399; } .ds-vs-missed { color: #f87171; } .ds-vs-center { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0 4px; } .ds-vs-pill { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-vs-footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-top: 12px; margin-top: 16px; } .ds-vs-stake { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 12px; } .ds-vs-open { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.description: Fixed bottom navigation shell. 3-4 item grid, glass surface, active item has white indicator line.
components.html: TodayChallengesProfile
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 1.9rem; padding: 4px; backdrop-filter: blur(40px); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; width: 100%; max-width: 448px; } .ds-nav-item { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; min-height: 69px; border-radius: 1.4rem; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); } .ds-nav-active { color: #ffffff; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 8px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 24px; height: 2px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #ffffff; }

narrative.overview:
SweatPact runs at negative space. A pure black field — not dark gray, not midnight blue, absolute #000000 — says that the data breaking the silence carries weight. White appears only where consequence lives: your score, their score, the verdict. The system does not decorate. Two people made an agreement; the interface records whether it was kept.

Color arrives at exactly two moments. Earned Green (#10b981 emerald) means you showed up and banked a day. Owed Red (#ef4444) means someone defaulted and a debt accrued. Everything else is achromatic. This is not minimalism for aesthetics — it is clarity that raises the stakes of the moments that do use color.

Glass surfaces create the only other dimension. Containers float at 4% white opacity on a black void, blur the layer behind them with backdrop-blur-xl, and lift to 6% on hover. This depth is structural, not decorative: it orients the user's eye without pulling focus from the status data that actually matters.
keyCharacteristics: Absolute black canvas (#000000), no tints, no near-blacks
White ink on void: pure achromatic hierarchy
Earned Green / Owed Red — the only chromatic signals, both semantic
Glass surfaces via opacity layering and backdrop-blur, zero box-shadows
Rounded-full pills for all interactive controls; 2rem curves for container shells
System font throughout — no display type, no typographic decoration
280ms ease-out-expo transitions; stagger on lists; full reduced-motion support

rules.name: The Pact Rule
rules.body: Color appears only at consequence. Emerald = fulfilled. Red = defaulted. Every other surface is achromatic. If you find yourself reaching for a third hue, you are decorating, not communicating. Prohibited.

rules.name: The Opacity Ladder Rule
rules.body: Glass surfaces follow exactly four steps: bg-white/[0.04] (rest), /[0.06] (hover), /[0.08] (active / unread / nav shell), /[0.14] (secondary button hover only). Border opacity: /10, /15, /18, /20, /25 only. Text opacity: /35, /40, /45, /55, /65, /70 only.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Box shadows are prohibited system-wide. Any perceived depth must be achievable through the opacity ladder and backdrop-blur. If you need a shadow to distinguish two elements, restructure the layout.

rules.name: The Glass Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Backdrop-blur exists only on persistent shells (top nav, bottom nav) and modal overlays. Content cards use backdrop-blur-xl (24px). Do not add blur to inline content elements like list rows, badges, or form fields.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: System font only. No Google Fonts, no display typefaces, no monospace decoration. Type that draws attention to itself competes with the data it labels.

rules.name: The Tracking Rule
rules.body: Letter-spacing is used at exactly two levels: 0.08em on micro (11px) labels, 0.18em on section labels (all-caps). Nowhere else. Tracking for atmosphere is prohibited.

dos: Use bg-white/[0.04] for default glass surfaces, /[0.06] for hover, /[0.08] for active and nav shells
Keep border opacity in the set: /10, /15, /18, /20, /25. Keep text opacity in: /35, /40, /45, /55, /65, /70
Use rounded-[2rem] for section containers, rounded-full for pills and buttons, rounded-[1.4rem] for list items, rounded-[1rem] for inputs
Use bg-emerald-500/90 fill for verified; dashed border-emerald-400 ring for unverified; bg-red-500/15 + border-red-500/70 for missed
Use icon + label on all section headers: icon at 12×12px, label text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/45
Add active:scale-[0.98] to all interactive buttons
Stagger list entrance animations with --stagger CSS variable (50–60ms per item)
Use backdrop-blur-xl on content cards, backdrop-blur-2xl on nav shells and modals
donts: Don't use non-standard Tailwind opacity values (/8, /12, /42, /46, /58, /74)
Don't add box shadows anywhere — the No-Shadow Rule is absolute
Don't use a third hue for anything other than semantic status (no blue accents, purple gradients, amber highlights)
Don't use rounded-2xl — section containers are rounded-[2rem] (32px), the distinction is intentional
Don't design like MyFitnessPal: no chart-heavy data density, no clinical metric grids, no logging-as-homework UX
Don't design like a standard SaaS dashboard: no gray sidebar nav, no metric cards in uniform grids
Don't design like Nike Run Club: no brand-forward logo treatment, no marketing-hero layout within app UI
Don't use display fonts or decorative typefaces in UI labels, buttons, or data
Don't add glassmorphism decoratively — no blur on inline content elements
Don't omit prefers-reduced-motion alternatives from any animation
